holdings.infoBox: VDC is an equity ETF with a total of 108 individual holdings. The top holdings are Walmart stock at 14.46%, Costco Wholesale at 11.81%, The Procter & Gamble Company at 8.67%, The Coca-Cola Company at 7.89%, and PepsiCo at 4.51%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Consumer Staples ETF (VDC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI US IMI 25/50 Consumer Staples indexThe fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of stocks in the consumer staples sector of the US market VDC was launched on Jan 26, 2004 and is issued by Vanguard.
